steps.description: Drill the slowest endpoints and their spans

dql: timeseries { p95 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 95, rollup: avg), reqs = sum(dt.service.request.count) }, by: { dt.service.name } | fieldsAdd p95_ms = p95[] / 1000 | sort arrayLast(p95_ms) desc
resultSummary: checkout is 58% of total p95 across 6 services

dql: fetch spans, from: now() - 2h | filter request.is_root_span == true and service.name == "checkout" | summarize { reqs = count(), p95 = percentile(duration, 95) }, by: { endpoint.name } | sort p95 desc | limit 10
resultSummary: /pay is the slowest endpoint at p95 4.2s

dql: fetch spans, from: now() - 2h | filter span.kind == "client" and isNotNull(db.system) | summarize { calls = sum(coalesce(aggregation.count, 1)), p95 = percentile(duration, 95) }, by: { db.statement } | sort p95 desc | limit 10
resultSummary: one orders SELECT = 65% of /pay p95 (~2.7s); cart shows ~1,820 DB calls/request

dql: fetch dt.event.deployment, from: now() - 7d | filter entity.name == "checkout" | fields timestamp, deployment.version | sort timestamp desc | limit 10
resultSummary: no deploy correlation — the hotspot predates the last 7 deploys

opportunity.finding: checkout /pay p95 is 4.2s — 65% is one unindexed orders query

impact.assumption: the query is the dominant, independent cost of /pay; based on its 65% share of p95 over 1,820 calls in the last 2h

opportunity.confidenceReason: a single query dominates the span tree across all sampled /pay traces
opportunity.dissent: traffic is low off-peak — impact concentrates 9–5
opportunity.recommendedAction: add an index on orders(status, created_at)

evidence.label: endpoint latency
evidence.dql: fetch spans, from: now() - 2h | filter request.is_root_span == true and service.name == "checkout" | summarize { p95 = percentile(duration, 95) }, by: { endpoint.name } | sort p95 desc

evidence.label: DB span share
evidence.dql: fetch spans, from: now() - 2h | filter span.kind == "client" and isNotNull(db.system) | summarize { p95 = percentile(duration, 95) }, by: { db.statement } | sort p95 desc

evidence.label: unindexed scan
evidence.resultSummary: latency scales with row count and there is no index on (status, created_at) — full-scan signature

evidence.label: dominant cost
evidence.resultSummary: assumes removing the query's cost yields ~64% of the p95 back to /pay

opportunity.finding: cart /view issues an N+1 pattern: ~1,820 DB calls per request

impact.assumption: DB round-trips are the bottleneck; collapsing the N+1 into one query removes ~1,800 calls/request

opportunity.confidenceReason: the N+1 pattern is clear in traces, but the fix requires a query/ORM change of uncertain size
opportunity.dissent: cart is ~12% of traffic — lower absolute impact than /pay
opportunity.recommendedAction: batch the per-item lookups into a single IN query

evidence.label: DB calls per request
evidence.dql: fetch spans, from: now() - 2h | filter service.name == "cart" and span.kind == "client" and isNotNull(db.system) | summarize { calls = count() }, by: { trace.id } | summarize { avg_calls = avg(calls) }

evidence.label: N+1 signature
evidence.resultSummary: one parent query followed by N near-identical child queries per cart item
